risk_if_not_implemented: Without Maintaining Workforce Development Relevancy, AI and autonomous technology risks may go ungoverned, leading to unintended outcomes or exploitation.

compensating_control_1.name: Human Resources Security Management
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of personnel security controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Human Resources Security Management (HRS-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Maintaining Workforce Development Relevancy (SAT-01.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Program (SCRP)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of security, compliance and resilience governance controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Program (SCRP) (GOV-01) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Maintaining Workforce Development Relevancy (SAT-01.1) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
